compiled_state.title: ticket transition close silently fails when chained with ticket comment in a single command that hits exit-144 timeout
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: When ticket comment and ticket transition are chained in a single Bash tool call (e.g., via && or ;), the combined execution time can exceed the ~73s tool timeout ceiling, producing exit 144. The ticket comment succeeds but the transition is silently dropped. The ticket remains in its previous status with no error surfaced to the caller. Observed during /dso:end-session when closing bug b9a9-4cb3 — the comment was written but the close was lost.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC). Root cause: docs chain ticket comment + ticket transition in single Bash call; combined time exceeds ~73s timeout ceiling (exit 144), silently dropping the transition.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
